info.name: Kazi Konnect - Complete API (All Endpoints & Payments)
info.description: Complete Postman collection for all Kazi Konnect routes, including corrected Admin approvals, Marketplace search, Message conversations, and newly added M-Pesa Payments / Escrow / Wallet endpoints.

request.description: Initiate M-Pesa STK Push payment for a job. Usually called by a Client.
Simulate Safaricom M-Pesa callback for STK push verification.
Get current escrow status and details of the payment for a job.
Release the escrow payment to the worker after successful approval.
Refund the escrow payment back to the client.
Retrieve the current wallet balance of the authenticated user.
